home.meta.title: Laitse Castle — Historic event venue in Harju County
home.meta.description: A neo-Gothic castle in Harju County — an elegant venue for weddings, celebrations, and seminars. Just 40 minutes from Tallinn.
home.hero.title: Laitse Castle
home.hero.subtitle: Your event deserves a castle!
home.hero.body: A neo-Gothic castle nestled in the heart of Harju County's natural landscape – perfect for weddings, celebrations, and seminars. Just 40 minutes from Tallinn
home.terrace.line1: Laitse Castle's summer terrace café is open Thursday to Sunday, 12–20
home.terrace.line2: Come and enjoy delicious food and refreshing drinks!

home.story.heading: The story of the castle
home.story.p1: The roots of Laitse Manor date back to 1637, when it was established as an independent manor, separated from Ruila Manor. Over the centuries, the manor has belonged to several noble families, including the von Ullrichs and the von Mohrenschildts.
home.story.p2: Under the leadership of Woldemar von Uexküll, a new, neo-Gothic-style main building was built – a romantic castle completed in 1892 that gives the site its recognizable character to this day.
history.meta.title: History of Laitse Castle — Neo-Gothic castle from 1892
history.meta.description: The history of Laitse Castle from 1637 to the completion of the neo-Gothic castle in 1892. Centuries of stories in one place.
history.hero.heading: Laitse Castle – a living history
history.p1: The roots of Laitse Manor date back to 1637, when it was established as an independent manor, separated from Ruila Manor. Over the centuries, the manor has belonged to several noble families, including the von Ullrichs and the von Mohrenschildts, under whose leadership the place's dignified and multilayered history developed.
history.p2: Woldemar von Uexküll, who acquired the manor in 1883, played a decisive role in shaping its current appearance. Under his leadership, a new, neo-Gothic-style main building was built next to the old manor heart – a romantic castle completed in 1892 that gives the site its recognizable character to this day.
history.p3: The last manor owner before the historical upheavals was Ullrich von Bremen, who owned the manor until its expropriation in 1919. Today, Laitse Castle carries the stories of centuries, offering visitors a unique opportunity to experience history as a living and inspiring environment.

events.services.card2.title: Weddings

events.rooms.heading: Our halls
events.rooms.klaverisalong.name: Salon
events.rooms.klaverisalong.desc: A lounge with a classic interior on the first floor of the castle. Natural light, a piano and a cozy atmosphere are ideal for both smaller celebrations and workshops.
events.rooms.peasaal.name: Formal Dining Hall
events.rooms.peasaal.desc: The main hall of the castle – an elegant venue for banquets and receptions. Historical details and a warm atmosphere create a memorable environment.
events.rooms.terrass.name: Terrace and garden
events.rooms.terrass.desc: The terrace offers the perfect setting for outdoor cocktails and dining. The large garden is ideal for summer events and ceremonies – a harmonious blend of nature and history.
events.rooms.terrass.imageAlt: Terrace and garden at Laitse Castle
events.rooms.suursaal.name: Grand Ballroom
events.rooms.suursaal.desc: The largest room in the castle. Suitable for larger parties, seminars, and events where you need space.
events.offer.heading: What we offer
events.offer.subtitle: A timeless environment with carefully selected additional features
events.offer.item1.title: Room rental
events.offer.item1.desc: Flexible space solutions tailored to the format and size of your event.
events.offer.item2.title: Decorations and decorating
events.offer.item2.desc: We'll help you create decorations that reflect your vision and complement the castle's historic interior.
events.offer.item3.title: Catering
events.offer.item3.desc: We can help you find the perfect catering solution for your event – from coffee breaks to a festive dinner.
events.offer.item4.title: Entertainment
events.offer.item4.desc: Through our partners we arrange lively entertainment for your event – for example social activities, musical performances and more.
seminars.meta.title: Seminars and corporate events — Laitse Castle
seminars.meta.description: An inspiring historic setting for seminars, conferences and team events at Laitse Castle. ~40 min from Tallinn, up to 120 participants.
seminars.hero.heading: Seminars and corporate events
seminars.intro.heading: Focus on what matters in an inspiring historic setting
seminars.intro.body: Laitse Castle offers an environment for seminars and corporate events unlike the usual conference hall. Historic rooms, a natural setting and distance from the bustle of Tallinn help participants focus and see things from a fresh angle.
seminars.features.heading: What we offer for seminars and corporate parties
seminars.features.item1.title: Flexible use of space
seminars.features.item1.desc: Rooms for 20-80 participants with various layouts - U-shape, classroom, theatre or banquet.
seminars.features.item2.title: Technical equipment
seminars.features.item2.desc: The presentation gear you need for a smooth working day - projector, screen, and WiFi throughout the rooms.
seminars.features.item3.title: Coffee breaks and catering
seminars.features.item3.desc: We help arrange coffee breaks, lunch and dinner to match your programme.
addons.meta.title: Additional services — Laitse Castle
addons.meta.description: Catering, decorations, accommodation, transport and other additional services that make your event at Laitse Castle smooth and memorable.
addons.hero.heading: Additional services
addons.hero.subtitle: Everything you need for your event to run smoothly
addons.intro.heading: We help with every detail
addons.intro.body: Beyond room rental, we help arrange everything that makes your event complete. Ask us for a personal quote.
addons.item1.title: Catering
addons.item1.desc: From coffee breaks to a festive dinner - we help arrange everything related to catering.
addons.item2.title: Accommodation
addons.item2.desc: We offer accommodation both at the castle and in the surrounding area.
addons.item3.title: Entertainment
addons.item3.desc: Through our partners you can book entertainment in various styles - for example a murder mystery game with dinner, a chocolate truffle workshop, or a modelling workshop guided by a sculptor.
addons.item4.title: Photographer and music
addons.item4.desc: We help find a photographer to capture your event. We can also help find a band or DJ to create the right mood at your event.
addons.item5.title: Decorations and decorating
addons.item5.desc: Floral arrangements and decorations can be ordered to suit the castle's historic interior.
